channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: People with cancer or HIV could lose Medicaid under new work rules, advocates say
item.description: Adults on Medicaid will be required to work 80 hours per month. The Trump administration says people who are sick will have to prove they are too sick...

item.title: Michael Jackson's shadow of doubt
item.description: A sanded-down biopic about the King of pop and propaganda has resurfaced his music on the charts — along with questions about how his enduring magic b...

item.title: Trump confirms calling Netanyahu 'crazy,' says they still get along
item.description: The president also acknowledged that he cursed at the Israeli leader in a heated phone call in which he told Benjamin Netanyahu not to bomb the Lebane...

item.title: How a single decision made a century ago split a family in half by race
item.description: Pope Leo's Black family roots inspired journalist Susan Saulny to research her Creole great-uncle who moved to Chicago, became white and didn't return...
